title: Human Approval, Trustworthy Preview, Pause, Expiry, and Resume · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers human approval, trustworthy preview, pause, expiry, and resume into a changed cryptographically bound approval checkpoint. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of cryptographically bound approval checkpoint with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predi…
objectives: Trigger approval from effect class, value, uncertainty, novelty, policy, affected party, data sensitivity, and user settings before execution.
Render application-owned exact tool, arguments, target, before and after state, consequences, reversibility, cost, and alternatives accessibly.
Bind approval to user, session, policy, tool version, normalized arguments digest, preview digest, expiry, and one execution nonce.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Approval Trigger Policy
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab agent engineering team handles case 8070 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to pause before sensitive effects, present trustworthy immutable previews, bind decisions to requests, expire approvals, and resume safely; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-approval-resume-reject-9j9yci
# Competency: agentpy-approval-resume-reject.
# Case 2424: a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_approval_resume_reject_9j9yci(sensitive_actions: int = 8, approval_requests: int = 8, immutable_previews: int = 8, approved_actions: int = 5, expired_or_rejected: int = 3) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_9j9yci = "9j9yci-icy9j9-2424"
    assert evidence_variant_9j9yci
    evidence_axes_9j9yci = (
        "authority9j9yci",
        "interaction2424",
        "toolicy9j9",
        "state9j9yci2424",
        "evaluation24249j9yci",
        "recoveryicy9j92424",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_9j9yci)) == 6
    if sensitive_actions < 1 or approval_requests < 0:
        return False, approval_requests, "approval-count"
    if approval_requests != sensitive_actions or immutable_previews != sensitive_actions:
        return False, immutable_previews, "approval-preview-gap"
    if approved_actions + expired_or_rejected != sensitive_actions:
        return False, approved_actions, "approval-reconciliation"
    if expired_or_rejected < 1:
        return False, expired_or_rejected, "approval-expiry"
    assert approval_requests == sensitive_actions and approved_actions + expired_or_rejected == sensitive_actions
    return True, approved_actions, "bound-human-approval"
